questions.text: Which modules are the most central god nodes or hubs in the architecture?
Which components are single points of failure whose removal would disconnect the system?
What are the main communities or clusters of tightly coupled modules?
Which modules are bottlenecks with high betweenness centrality?
Which modules act as bridges connecting otherwise separate communities?
Which modules are isolated or orphaned with no incoming dependencies?
Are there dependency cycles, and which modules participate in them?
Which modules have the highest fan-in and fan-out degree?
What overall layering or architectural style does the dependency graph reveal?
Which source files are most critical to the project's test coverage?
